notes: Set counts_per_mm from a 2-point measurement (jaws closed + one gauge block); see egogrip_pipeline.calibration.calibrate_width. count_zero is the AS5600 start-closed tare reported by the firmware ZERO command. direction is +/-1 for the encoder's count sense. Camera intrinsics and T_ctrl_gripper (controller->TCP) extrinsics live here too once the Phase-4 calibration exists.
